ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contestants" (
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contestant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contestant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contestant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contestant's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contestant's account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contestant (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contestant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contests" (
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contest */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contest was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contest was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contest (e.g., active, pending, completed) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant */,
  "projected_price" TEXT /* Predicted price by the contestant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the prediction is the final one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_contestant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contestant_id") REFERENCES contestants ("contestant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actual_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actual price */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "actual_price" TEXT /* Actual price of the financial instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actual price was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actual price was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the actual price data (e.g., exchange, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actual_prices_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "distance_from_actual" TEXT /* Distance between the predicted and actual price */,
  "distance_from_actual_percentage" TEXT /* Distance between the predicted and actual price as a percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the contestant in the contest based on the distance from the actual price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, contestant, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
